headline: Softened the main hero from rigid reading copy to a warmer travel-entry line.
focus: Change the oversized four-line hero into a softer, shorter mobile-first travel phrase.
notes: Changed the main Korean hero direction toward '도시를 느끼고, 여행을 시작하세요.'
Reduced mobile hero headline size and vertical pressure.
Limited forced line breaks so the title no longer feels like a large popup ad.
Preserved generated route and loading behavior.
